title: teucrium scordioides var. lanuginosum
intro: Teucrium scordioides var. lanuginosum, also known as woolly germander, is a perennial herbaceous plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and carminative effects. The health benefits of Teucrium scordioides var. lanuginosum include relief from digestive issues, such as bloating and indigestion, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and reduce blood pressure. Teucrium scordioides var. lanuginosum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
